close_reason: All children complete. Recovery now reads cluster topology from logs via metadata materializer instead of coordinator.
description:
Enables recovery to read cluster topology from logs instead of relying solely on the coordinator. This is the FDB pattern where any log can bootstrap the cluster.

Completed work:
- Store logical identities (not PIDs)
- Reduce coordinator to mini-TSL (log identities only)
- Metadata routed to all logs (bedrock-3tb)
- System key schema for metadata distribution

Remaining work:
- bedrock-jkcm: Recovery bootstraps from metadata shard materializer (reads config from object storage, starts materializer, queries for shard layout)

This epic is complete when jkcm is done.
title: Metadata Distribution Prerequisites
